global.description: The ad features a bold orange background with prominent text and a call to action.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text at the top that reads 'CraveLoop' against the orange background.

elements.label: Body text description
elements.description: Medium-sized white text in the center that says 'Fast food, fast'.

elements.label: Additional body text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main body text that reads 'Late-night deals available'.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A prominent white text displaying the price '€9.99' in the center.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded white button at the bottom with the text 'Order now' in bold.

elements.label: Icon representation
elements.description: Two simple outlined icons representing food items, centered above the body text.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Late-night deals available €9.99 Order now

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring a minimalistic design.
